title: Anjana Anjana Lyrics Vandhaan Vendraan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Aaalaap Raju
Lyrics: Yugabharathi 
Song: Anjana Anjana 
Movie: Vandhaan Vendraan
Music: Thaman S

Indru mudhalthaan pudhithaanen
Un Iniya siripinil mugil aanen
Kottum mazhai pol sugam aanen
Un Konjum udhatinil tamil aanen
Un Konjum udhatinil tamil aanen

Anjana Anjana anbe anbe Anjana
Un otrai paarvai podhum anjana
Anjana Anjana illai nane Anjana
Nanum neeyaai aanen Anjana

Ah podu podu, ah thandhanathom podu
Ne andharathil aadu, Ah thulli vizhayaadu
Ah thottu thottu paadu,edhuku kattupaadu
Ne vandhu vandhu thaedu,ah kata kata sudu
Ne mutti mutti moodu, pakkathil ennai naadu
Unadhu vizhiyodu ennai marandhene

Unnmaiyaanen.., Unnmaiyaanen,.Unnai pole .. anmaiyaanen..
Venmaiyaanen.. Venmaiyaanen..Mella naanum thanmaiyaanen..

Kadhal kadhal vandhale, Thaneerum kooda thee pole
Thannaale maarum manmele, sandhosam koodum nenjulle
Aagayam undhan kal kele, poo kolam podum panbaale
Vedhaalam ondru unnulle, Vizhyaadi pogum cell-nulle ...

Oru chinna paarvayil,
Nan Nan viduthalai viduthalai adaindhene
Unadhu anbu vaarthayil
Naan piraviyin payanayum arindheney....

Ye kelu kelu,ne ennavendru kelu
Ne eppozhudhum kelu,Nan solluvathai kelu
Sollaadhadhayum kelu, Nerungi vandhu kelu
Unadharugil mozhiyaai varuvene..
Unnmaiyaanen...., Unnmaiyaanen,...

Siragu illaiyaayinum, 
naan iragena iragena parandhene
kanavillai aayinum,
nan mulluvadhum mulluvadhum kalaindhene

Ye paaru paaru, ah pakkam vandhu paaru
Ne paadi paaadi paaru, ah pathirama paadu
Paadharasam paaru, padhukavillai paaru,
Sila nodigalil ennai naan tharuvene...

Unnmaiyaanen.., Unnmaiyaanen, Unnai pole, anmaiyaanen,
Venmaiyaanen.. Venmaiyaanen..Mella naanum thanmaiyaanen

Kadhal kadhal vandhale, Thaneerum kooda thee pole
Thannaale maarum manmele, sandhosam koodum nenjulle
Aagayam undhan kal kele, poo kolam podum panbaale
Vedhaalam ondru unnulle, Vizhyaadi pogum cell-nulle ...

Anjana Anjana illai nane Anjana ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Anjana Anjana?

The song Anjana Anjana expresses deep romantic feelings and the joy of being in love.

What is the plot context of the song in Vandhaan Vendraan?

This song is featured in a romantic context, highlighting the protagonist's feelings for their love interest.

Who is the singer of Anjana Anjana?

The song is sung by the talented artist Aalap Raju.

Who composed the music for Vandhaan Vendraan?

The music for the movie was composed by Thaman S.

When was Anjana Anjana released?

The song was released on July 22, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Anjana Anjana, the protagonist expresses their heartfelt emotions and affection towards their beloved. The song beautifully encapsulates the joy and excitement of love, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With its soothing melody and captivating lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and warmth. This track stands out as a memorable piece in the film Vandhaan Vendraan, resonating with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Anjana Anjana from the movie Vandhaan Vendraan is a captivating romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by the talented Aalap Raju, this song features enchanting lyrics by Yugabharathi and mesmerizing music composed by Thaman S. The vibrant energy and heartfelt emotions make this track a must-listen for anyone celebrating love.
stanzaMeanings: From today, I have become new, I have become a cloud in your sweet smile, I have become happiness like the rain that falls, I have become Tamil in your little breath, I have become Tamil in your little breath.
Anjana, Anjana, my dear, Anjana, just your one glance is enough, Anjana, Anjana, I am not Anjana, I have become you, Anjana.

Oh, let it go, let it go, we have given it up, In this world, let it dance, Oh, let it fall, let it fall, why should we sing? You come and search, oh, let it be, I close my eyes, forgetting you with your eyes.
I am the truth, I am the truth, I am like you, I am the soul, I am the purity, Slowly, I too will become pure.

Love has come, like water and fire, It will change on its own, happiness will gather in the heart, The sky will listen to your call, flowers will bloom in your presence, A ghost is within you, it will go away in the cell...
Anjana, Anjana, I am not Anjana.
In a small glance, I have found freedom, In your words of love, I have understood the journey of life...
Hey, listen, listen, ask me what I am, Always listen, listen to what I say, Listen to what is not said, come close and listen, I will come to you in words... I am the truth, I am the truth...
Even without wings, I have flown, Even without dreams, I have bloomed.
Hey, look, look, come and see, You sing, sing, come and see, Look at the essence of the song, look, it is not a burden, In some moments, I will give you...
I am the truth, I am the truth, I am like you, I am the soul, I am the purity, Slowly, I too will become pure.

Love has come, like water and fire, It will change on its own, happiness will gather in the heart, The sky will listen to your call, flowers will bloom in your presence, A ghost is within you, it will go away in the cell...
Anjana, Anjana, I am not Anjana.
